name: Amazoness Trainee
name_jp: アマゾネス<ruby lang="jp"><rb>訓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>練</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Monsters destroyed by battle with this card are placed on the bottom of the Deck instead of going to the GY. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It gains 200 ATK.
mnst_eff: Monsters destroyed by battle with this card are placed on the bottom of the Deck instead of going to the GY. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It gains 200 ATK.
eff: Monsters destroyed by battle with this card are placed on the bottom of the Deck instead of going to the GY. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It gains 200 ATK.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Attack from the Deep
Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
Returns to the Deck cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
